visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a black and white layered dress stands in a Costco aisle, holding two white egg cartons. She has long black hair and a friendly facial expression. The background shows warehouse industrial shelves stacked with brown cardboard boxes under bright ceiling lights. (2) The woman gestures with her right hand towards the egg cartons, emphasizing her points. A large red COSTCO logo and decorative yellow text overlays are visible on the upper and lower parts of the screen. Her expression is enthusiastic and engaging. (3) The camera pans right to reveal large blue pallets holding cardboard boxes, some of which appear to be empty egg carton holders. The warehouse environment is clearly visible with metal racking extending into the depth of the store. (4) Transition to a close-up overhead shot of two open egg cartons on a white surface. The cartons contain twenty brown eggs each. A person's hand reaches in to pick up one egg, showing its smooth, dark brown shell texture. (5) Two eggs are held side-by-side between a pair of hands for comparison. One egg is a significantly darker shade of brown than the other. The hands then tap the two eggs together several times to demonstrate their physical durability.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 隱藏款必買. [Slogan]: 綠璽農場平飼紅殼蛋. (2) [Variety]: 9.3塊. (3) [Subtitle]: 兩盒打開.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One woman appearing as the primary host throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black and white layered dress and a silver necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, featuring industrial shelving, pallets, and boxes of eggs and other products.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) An enthusiastic female voice begins speaking at a fast pace in Mandarin Chinese, introducing Green Seal eggs. A medium-tempo pop BGM with electronic synthesizers and a steady drum beat plays continuously in the background. The vocal is clear and professional. (2) A male voice interjects with a brief exclamation of agreement. A subtle pop sound effect is heard, coinciding with a visual text change. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo. Ambient room tone is minimal. (3) The female speaker's pitch rises as she discusses the price difference, showing high emotional arousal. The male voice laughs softly in the background. The interplay between the two voices is casual and conversational, characteristic of a vlog. (4) A distinct mechanical clicking sound occurs twice, representing the tapping of eggshells to test thickness. These transients are sharp and have a high-frequency focus. The female voice continues to describe the shell quality while the background music maintains its rhythmic drive.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Comparison -> Quality Test -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To recommend a specific brand of eggs sold at Costco by highlighting their humane farming practices, competitive pricing compared to standard markets, and superior shell quality verified by physical testing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host provides a detailed review and strong verbal recommendation for the specific egg product found in Costco.
endorsementObject: 綠璽農場 (Green Seal Farm) Eggs

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-energy retail discovery vlog focused on a value-for-money food item at a wholesale club.
